text: The first image evokes a sense of curiosity and detachment; I observe a room filled with participants engaged in some collective learning or workshop, separated by glass from my own space—an odd liminality. In the second image, I feel energized and contemplative. Surrounded by bold colors and thought-provoking displays about research and development, the air is charged with the promise of new human-machine connections. I ponder the interplay between structured inquiry and creative exploration, wondering about the broader consequences of our relentless pursuit of knowledge.
